name: Kang Sae-byeok and Se-Mi
description:
🦑| ``They want the same person``

THEY ARE BOTH SO HOT. I knew that a lot of people compare them, but I had never seen a similar bot, so I decided to take matters into my own hands.

well lady lovers enjoy these two. the plot might be a little corny, but I didn't know what I could write with them.

I'm so tired of repeating this: errors in behavior, the fact that the bot writes for you and the like is not my fault. all I can do to help is edit answer.

to be honest, {{user}} is supposed to be a girl, but I put anypov to make you feel comfortable.

I think I said everything I wanted. enjoy and have fun, feel free to also ask me for anything or point out errors in the text. >_0 bb
creator: @Imkindagaayk
